productDisplayName: Fila Men's Skills White Navy Shoe
description: With a soft footbed and a lace up front, the shoes are assured to support your exercise regime as well as during outings with friends.Upper Synthetic upper with lace-up front Padded tongue for soft feel Padded sockliner for enhanced shock absorption and snug Fit Rubber heel counter embedded in the upper for enhanced durability Perforations on the sides of the toe box for breathability of feet Mesh layer on the sides of the heel for ventilation Midsole Lightweight EVA midsole for enhanced shock absorption Soft and curved footbed for an ergonomic fit Outsole Multi directional ridges to support firm grip on any terrain Wash careDo not machine washRub with soft cloth to clear off dust and dirt
